title: phlomoides affinis
intro: Phlomoides affinis, also known as Phlomis affinis, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family and is native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlomoides affinis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used in herbal remedies such as capsules or tablets.
